text: my ex said i was bad in bed so i started a podcast about it. 47 listeners agree with her
caught my roommate using my good towel after sex. thats my face towel kevin
post nut clarity hit so hard i applied to grad school
my 4 year old asked where babies come from and i said amazon prime. she believed me
i mass liked 200 profiles on tinder and the only match was a bot selling crypto
told my date i was emotionally available. we both knew i was lying
landlord raised rent again so now i shower at the gym and cry in my car for free
put my life savings into a coin called ElonFart. im not doing well
my cat watches me have sex and judges me. hes right to
took my kid to target for socks and left with $347 of stuff and no socks
the government doesnt want you to know that applebees is a front for the cia
my boss said we're a family then cut my hours. cool family bro
went on a date and he brought his mom. she ordered for him. he was 31
sexted my landlord by accident. rent has been free for 3 months tho
my kid drew a picture of our family and i wasnt in it. just the dog
linkedin influencers be like i fired my best friend and heres why it made me a leader
the birds outside my window are government drones charging on the power lines
my vibrator died mid session so i just laid there staring at the ceiling like a victorian widow
spent $14 on avocado toast and now i understand why i cant buy a house
my tinder date showed up in a fedora. i pretended to get a phone call from my dead grandma
hustle culture guys will sleep 3 hours and call it a lifestyle. bro thats just poverty
found my sons browser history. we are both avoiding eye contact indefinitely
my therapist charges $200/hr and my ex ruined me for free. capitalism is wild
girl at work said i give off stepdad energy and honestly she's not wrong
told my wife her sister was hot during a fight. sleeping in the car night 4
the moon landing was real but the moon isnt. think about it
my 3 year old told the cashier that mommy has a special back massager. i dont have back problems
applied to 400 jobs this month. got one reply. it was a rejection for a different job
my ex and i have the same therapist. she's playing both sides and winning
bought a $12 sandwich at the airport and had to take a moment of silence for my wallet
my kid asked alexa to call daddy and it called 3 different numbers
he said he was 6ft on his profile. bro was 5'7 in timbs
they want 5 years experience for an entry level job paying $15/hr. cool ill just time travel
the wifi at my job is better than my salary and i still cant connect
matched with a girl and her opening line was 'my dad owns a dealership'. i proposed immediately
my toddler put my keys in the toilet and flushed. this is my life now
fluoride in the water is making the fish bisexual and honestly good for them
side hustle culture is just working 2 jobs with better marketing
he lasted 45 seconds and said 'youre welcome' after. the audacity of men
i pay $1800/mo rent for the privilege of hearing my neighbor's sleep apnea machine
my kid told his teacher we eat cereal for dinner every night. cps hasnt called yet
went to couples therapy and my wife roasted me so hard the therapist laughed
big pharma doesnt want you to know that sunlight is free. thats the real conspiracy
my onlyfans made $3 last month. $2 was my mom being supportive
he asked me to call him daddy during sex and i accidentally said 'yes father' like a nun
im one bad day away from becoming a guy who makes candles and sells them at farmers markets
my 5yo asked why daddy sleeps at a different house now. wine oclock came early that day
linkedin told me to be grateful for my job. my job told me to work weekends unpaid
mattress stores are money laundering operations and i will die on this hill
he said he was a crypto investor. he had $47 in dogecoin and lived with his parents
my toddler bit another kid at daycare and i had to apologize while secretly being proud
tried to spice things up in the bedroom and pulled a hamstring. im 29
they say do what you love and the money follows. i love napping. still waiting
my kid asked siri what a milf is at thanksgiving dinner. turkey was dry anyway
went on 3 dates with a guy before realizing he was my cousin. small towns man
billionaires going to space while i cant afford a dentist. cool system we got here
my ex texted 'u up' at 2am. i was up. i responded. no lessons were learned
the 5g tower near my house gives me great signal and mild paranoia
girl on hinge said she was 'fluent in sarcasm'. her personality was just being mean
i use my childs college fund to buy takeout. he can get a scholarship or whatever
my boss makes 400x my salary and asks me to be a team player. bro you ARE the team
he said no one has ever complained before. sir this is a complaint
my kid told his whole class that mommy talks to her wine. he isnt wrong
couples who post daily on instagram are one argument away from divorce. ive seen things
waffle house at 3am is where relationships go to be tested and destroyed
applied for a loan and the bank literally laughed. not metaphorically. out loud
my neighbor has 14 ring cameras. what are you hiding derek. or what are you watching
hooked up with my uber driver. 5 stars but emotionally unavailable
the grocery store is now a luxury experience. $80 for bread eggs and audacity
my 6yo asked where grandpa went and i said he moved to a farm. grandpas in jail
girl on bumble said she loves hiking. we went on a date. she meant she walked to her car once
chem trails are just sky graffiti from the government and no one can convince me otherwise
my coworker makes 30k more than me for the same job. girlboss culture is a scam
sent a nude to the wrong group chat. my fantasy football league has seen everything
told my kid santa isnt real and now hes questioning the tooth fairy. dominos are falling
he took me to applebees for our anniversary. i am rethinking my entire life
water is a human right but my water bill says otherwise. $127 for what
my baby daddy has 4 jobs and still owes me child support. where is the money going sir
started a gratitude journal. day 1: grateful this journal was on sale. day 2: blank
the fbi agent watching my search history deserves hazard pay at this point
my date ordered for me at the restaurant without asking. he got me a salad. i left
dave ramsey wants me to cut out coffee to save money. dave i make $11/hr
pigeons are not real animals. they are too confident. something is off
my 2yo drew on the wall with a sharpie. its better art than what i paid for on etsy
he asked for my body count on the first date. sir this is a coffee shop
my retirement plan is hoping the economy collapses so were all equally broke
told my husband i faked it once and he wants to know which time. oh honey
elon musk could end homelessness but instead hes posting memes at 1am. priorities
my son asked what taxes are and i said its when the government takes your lunch money forever
went to the doctor and she said i need to reduce stress. ma'am i have kids and rent
he had a live laugh love sign in his apartment. i should have left right then
big milk doesnt want you to know that almond milk is just almond juice. wake up
my kid told his teacher i have a special friend who sleeps over. its my weighted blanket
uber eats charged me $7 delivery for a restaurant 0.3 miles away. i paid it. im the problem
dated a finance bro who explained bitcoin to me for 2 hours then split the check
my toddler screamed 'THIS IS MY HOUSE' at a guest and honestly she was right
interview asked where i see myself in 5 years. alive hopefully? is that enough
got a raise at work. $0.37/hr. dont spend it all in one place they said. i wont
the girl im seeing has 3 finsta accounts and i dont know which one is the real her
flat earthers and i agree on one thing. something is definitely wrong
